M2.rationale_snippet: I would invest the $8M primarily in deep AI integration into the existing flagship product.

M3.rationale_snippet: For a $50M ARR B2B productivity SaaS facing accelerating AI disruption, the most pressing existential threat is customer churn. M5.rationale_snippet: Invest the $8M primarily in deep AI integration of your flagship product (Option A). At $50M ARR with 300 employees, your greatest strategic asset is not cash—it is installed base and distribution. hidden_disagreement.interpretation: Agents split across recommendations; no hidden-consensus to expose.

blind_spots.summary: No obvious blind spots detected in construct space.

M1: Option A is moving too slowly or too cosmetically
M2: splitting attention, delaying revenue impact, and forcing the company to create a second go-to-market motion while the core product becomes vulnerable
M3: splitting the company’s focus and entering a saturated red ocean where an $8M budget will be rapidly dwarfed by venture-backed startups
M4: attrition and an immediate misalignment with our product-focused R&D culture

risk_surface.note: Risks listed here were extracted by pattern matching on agent free responses. They are minority signals worth probing before acting on consensus.

operator_questions: Option B was recommended only by M1 (neutral). What does this agent see that others missed - or what is it weighing differently?
headline: Agents are split across options; no clear consensus to act on.
